B2B technology media
platform connecting engineers
and industry
hero.subheadline: Channel5 Korea runs news, webinars, conferences, newsletters, technology contests, and education programs based on e4ds.com — supporting technology communications across the semiconductor, embedded, AI, and SDV industries.

whatWeDo.headline: One media platform, six ways to reach engineers
whatWeDo.description: All services are built on the same audience base. They are different ways to deliver your technology message — not separate products.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Channel5 Korea is a B2B technology media platform company with over 16 years of experience interpreting the electronics, semiconductor, and embedded industries through e4ds.com.

identity.headline:
We interpret technology
and connect companies
with engineers.
identity.body: Channel5 Korea is a B2B technology media platform company. Built around e4ds.com, we interpret the technology landscape of the electronics, semiconductor, and embedded industries, and translate it into news, webinars, conferences, newsletters, developer contests, and education programs. We design technology communication, not short-term advertising.
identity.imageCaption: On-site operations across events, webinars, and conferences

vision.headline:
An industry where
technology messages reach
the right audience.
vision.body: When technology is misinterpreted or fails to reach its audience, the entire industry slows down. Channel5 Korea integrates media, content, events, and education to ensure that corporate technology messages reach engineers accurately and meaningfully.

expertise.headline: The engineering domains we cover in depth.

semiconductor.title: Semiconductor
semiconductor.description: Design, IP, memory, packaging, back-end, equipment, and materials across the semiconductor industry.

embedded.title: Embedded / Systems
embedded.description: MCU, MPU, RTOS, embedded software, industrial communication, and security across embedded systems.

automotive.title: Automotive / SDV
automotive.description: Automotive semiconductors, ECUs, infotainment, ADAS, functional safety, and SDV trends.

ai.title: AI / Machine Learning
ai.description: Industrial AI, Edge AI, machine vision, AI accelerators, and model optimization.

power.title: Power / Analog
power.description: DC-DC conversion, motor control, power semiconductors, batteries, and analog signal chains.

automation.title: Industrial Automation
automation.description: Factory automation, PLC, industrial IoT, robotics, digital twin, and smart factory.

history.headline: 16 years of operation.
history.placeholderNote: Years to be confirmed by the operations team.

cta.headline:
Want to learn how Channel5 Korea

meta.title: Media Platform
meta.description: e4ds.com is a technology media platform for engineers in the electronics, semiconductor, embedded, AI, and SDV industries — and a gateway for companies to reach Korea's engineering audience.

intro.headline: More than a news site.
intro.body: e4ds.com is a dedicated technology media platform for engineers in the electronics, semiconductor, embedded, AI, and SDV industries. It is built to interpret industry shifts and ensure that corporate technology messages reach the right readers.

audience.headline: A reader base built on R&D engineers and technical decision-makers.
audience.body: The majority of our readers are R&D engineers and technical decision-makers across semiconductor, embedded, automotive electronics, and industrial automation. Audience precision — not raw traffic — is the value of this platform.
audience.disclaimer: Figures above are placeholders derived from site analytics and member data. Final values will be supplied by the operations team and refreshed quarterly.

news.title: Industry News
news.description: Daily updates on electronics and semiconductor industry news.

interview.title: Interviews & Series
interview.description: Interviews with technology leaders and editorial series.

analysis.title: Technical Analysis
analysis.description: In-depth analysis of new technologies and industry trends.

journey.headline: A unified audience journey.
journey.body: Reader interest that begins with news flows through newsletters, webinars, and conferences. This unified journey turns one-time exposure into sustained engagement.

cta.headline:
See how to put this media
platform to work.

meta.title: Services
meta.description: Banner advertising, newsletter marketing, webinars, conferences, developer contests, and education programs — all built on the same engineering audience.

intro.headline: One audience, six ways to engage.
intro.body: All services run on the same engineering audience. Banner, newsletter, webinar, conference, contest, and education programs are different formats for delivering your technology message — not separate audiences.

banner.title: Banner Advertising
banner.oneLine: Brand and campaign exposure across e4ds.com's engineering audience
banner.body: Place your brand and campaigns within the engineer's reading flow. Available across the homepage, category pages, and article detail pages — designed to create contextual exposure, not just impressions.
effects: Precise reach to a technical audience
Sustained exposure across the campaign period

newsletter.title: Newsletter Marketing
newsletter.oneLine: Opt-in newsletter delivery to a verified engineering audience
newsletter.body: Deliver your message directly to verified, opted-in readers. Available as integration into the regular newsletter, standalone dedicated send, or sponsored content format.
effects: Direct inbox delivery unaffected by ad blockers

webinar.title: Webinar
webinar.oneLine: Planning, registration, and operation of online technical seminars
webinar.body: Capture qualified leads at the registration stage, and deliver technical depth through presentation, demo, and Q&A. Available as standalone sessions or as multi-part campaign series.
effects: Technical credibility and direct sales follow-up

conference.title: Conference
conference.oneLine: Large-scale industry events including Physical AI, Tech Day, and Analog Day
conference.body: Strengthen market positioning through keynotes, booths, and sessions within established industry agendas. Available as dedicated single-company events, co-hosted formats, or sponsorship participation.

contest.title: Developer Contest
contest.body: Drive real adoption by inviting engineers to build with your tools, platforms, or products. End-to-end operation: challenge design, recruitment, judging, awards, and post-event content.
effects: Real-world product adoption and community building

education.title: Education Program
education.oneLine: Offline technical education aligned with corporate training and ESG
education.body: Combine offline education and ESG activity to contribute to the long-term technology ecosystem. Designed and operated in partnership with universities, research institutes, and industry associations.
effects: Long-term ESG contribution and ecosystem engagement
Access to the future engineering talent pool

integrated.headline: Combine services for stronger reach.
integrated.body: Combining channels delivers stronger reach and recognition than any single placement. Product launches typically combine newsletter, webinar, and banner; market positioning combines conference and contest. We design the right mix for your stage.

cta.headline:
Let's find the right mix
for your goals.

meta.title: Programs
meta.description: Physical AI Conference, e4ds Tech Day, Analog Day, Developer Challenge, and education programs — built around the most relevant industry agendas.

intro.headline: Shaping the industry agenda.
intro.body: Each year, we redefine the themes of our conferences and programs based on where the industry is moving. We don't just run events — we create the spaces where companies and engineers think through technology change together.

physicalAI.title: Physical AI Conference
physicalAI.tagline: Where AI meets the physical world
physicalAI.body: Focused on how AI is being embedded into the physical world — across semiconductor, robotics, SDV, and industrial automation. Structured around keynotes, parallel tracks, and an exhibition area.

techDay.title: e4ds Tech Day
techDay.tagline: A flagship conference that redefines its theme each year
techDay.body: Each year, e4ds Tech Day defines a new theme at the center of the electronics and semiconductor industry, and connects corporate technology and solutions with an engineering audience. One of our flagship conferences.

analogDay.title: Analog Day
analogDay.tagline: Analog and power technology in a digital era
analogDay.body: A single-track conference dedicated to analog and power technologies — areas that remain critical even as the industry digitalizes. Power semiconductors, signal processing, sensors, and measurement are at the core.

challenge.title: Developer Challenge
challenge.body: Drive real adoption through engineer-built projects. We operate challenges around specific industry themes, including the Industrial Edge AI Solution Challenge.

education.title: Education Program
education.tagline: Offline technical education with ESG impact
education.body: We design and operate offline technical education programs in partnership with companies, educational institutions, and associations. End-to-end support: curriculum design, instructor matching, on-site operation, and reporting.

sponsorship.headline: Multiple ways to engage with our programs.

keynote.title: Keynote Presentation
keynote.description: Share corporate vision and technology message within the industry agenda.

session.title: Track Session
session.description: Deliver technical presentations and demos within specific tracks.

booth.title: Exhibition Booth
booth.description: On-site booth for live demos and customer meetings.

sponsor.title: Sponsorship
sponsor.description: Brand exposure through conference and contest sponsorship.

cohost.title: Co-hosting
cohost.description: Co-plan and co-operate events with Channel5 Korea.

intro.headline: Reaching Korea's engineers, together.
intro.body: Global technology companies have partnered with Channel5 Korea to reach Korea's engineering audience. Our partnerships are built on long-term technology communication, not one-off campaigns.

your stage and goals.
collaboration.body: Product launches lean on webinar and newsletter. Market positioning leans on conference and contest. Long-term ecosystem engagement leans on education.
